'''Paouoish Rahhdool''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who was part of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="DB" /> He<ref name="CSWE" /> discovered the [[Youngling/Legends|infant]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] [[Voolvif Monn]] abandoned on a [[Planet/Legends|world]] near the [[Arah asteroid belt]]. Rahdool took Monn as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and trained him to hone his tracking abilities and [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] instincts with his innate [[The Force/Legends|Force]] skills to become a fearsome opponent in combat. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the Clone Wars, Monn also became a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master.<ref name="DB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Paouoish Rahhdool was first mentioned in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry of his pupil Voolvif Monn.<ref name="DB" />
